entries.title: Introducing GPT-5.5
entries.summary: Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.

entries.title: GPT-5.5 System Card
Automations
entries.summary: Learn how to automate tasks in Codex using schedules and triggers to create reports, summaries, and recurring workflows without manual effort.

entries.title: Top 10 uses for Codex at work
entries.summary: Explore 10 practical Codex use cases to automate tasks, create deliverables, and turn real inputs into outputs across tools, files, and workflows.

entries.title: Plugins and skills
entries.summary: Learn how to use Codex plugins and skills to connect tools, access data, and follow repeatable workflows to automate tasks and improve results.

entries.title: Working with Codex
entries.summary: Learn how to set up your Codex workspace, create threads and projects, manage files, and start completing tasks with step-by-step guidance.

entries.title: Codex settings
entries.summary: Learn how to configure Codex settings, including personalization, detail level, and permissions, to run tasks smoothly and customize your workflow.

entries.title: What is Codex?
entries.summary: Learn how Codex helps you go beyond chat by automating tasks, connecting tools, and producing real outputs like docs and dashboards.

entries.title: How to get started with Codex
entries.summary: Learn how to get started with Codex by setting up projects, creating threads, and completing your first tasks with step-by-step guidance.

entries.title: GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty
entries.summary: Explore the GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty: a red-teaming challenge to find universal jailbreaks for bio safety risks, with rewards up to $25,000.

entries.title: Making ChatGPT better for clinicians
entries.summary: OpenAI makes ChatGPT for Clinicians free for verified U.S. physicians, nurse practitioners, and pharmacists, supporting clinical care, documentation, and research.

entries.title: Workspace agents
entries.summary: Learn how to build, use, and scale workspace agents in ChatGPT to automate repeatable workflows, connect tools, and streamline team operations.

entries.title: Speeding up agentic workflows with WebSockets in the Responses API
entries.summary: A deep dive into the Codex agent loop, showing how WebSockets and connection-scoped caching reduced API overhead and improved model latency.

entries.title: Introducing workspace agents in ChatGPT
entries.summary: Workspace agents in ChatGPT are Codex-powered agents that automate complex workflows, run in the cloud, and help teams scale work across tools securely.

entries.title: Introducing OpenAI Privacy Filter
entries.summary: OpenAI Privacy Filter is an open-weight model for detecting and redacting personally identifiable information (PII) in text with state-of-the-art accuracy

entries.title: Introducing ChatGPT Images 2.0
entries.summary: ChatGPT Images 2.0 introduces a state-of-the-art image generation model with improved text rendering, multilingual support, and advanced visual reasoning.

entries.title: Scaling Codex to enterprises worldwide
entries.summary: OpenAI launches Codex Labs, partners with with Accenture, PwC, Infosys, and others to help enterprises deploy and scale Codex across the software development lifecycle, and hits 4M Codex WAU.

entries.title: OpenAI helps Hyatt advance AI among colleagues
entries.summary: Hyatt deploys ChatGPT Enterprise across its global workforce, using GPT-5.4 and Codex to improve productivity, operations, and guest experiences.

entries.title: Codex for (almost) everything
entries.summary: The updated Codex app for macOS and Windows adds computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins to accelerate developer workflows.

entries.title: Introducing GPT-Rosalind for life sciences research
entries.summary: OpenAI introduces GPT-Rosalind, a frontier reasoning model built to accelerate drug discovery, genomics analysis, protein reasoning, and scientific research workflows.

entries.title: Decoupled DiLoCo: A new frontier for resilient, distributed AI training
Partnering with industry leaders to accelerate AI transformation
entries.summary: Google DeepMind partners with global consultancies to bring the power of frontier AI to organizations around the world.

entries.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS: the next generation of expressive AI speech
entries.summary: Our newest audio model introduces granular audio tags that give you precise control to direct AI speech for expressive audio generation.

entries.title: Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6: Powering real-world robotics tasks through enhanced embodied reasoning
entries.summary: Gemini Robotics ER 1.6: Enhancing spatial reasoning and multi-view understanding for autonomous robotics.

entries.title: Gemma 4: Byte for byte, the most capable open models
entries.summary: Gemma 4: Our most intelligent open models to date, purpose-built for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows.

entries.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
entries.summary: Our latest voice model has improved precision and lower latency to make voice interactions more fluid, natural and precise.

entries.title: Protecting people from harmful manipulation
entries.summary: Google DeepMind researches AI's harmful manipulation risks across areas like finance and health, leading to new safety measures.

entries.title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more
entries.summary: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro, which unlocks longer tracks with structural awareness. We’re also bringing Lyria to more Google products and surfaces.

entries.title: Measuring progress toward AGI: A cognitive framework
entries.summary: We’re introducing a framework to measure progress toward AGI, and launching a Kaggle hackathon to build the relevant evaluations.

entries.title: From games to biology and beyond: 10 years of AlphaGo’s impact
entries.summary: Ten years since AlphaGo, we explore how it is catalyzing scientific discovery and paving a path to AGI.

entries.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
entries.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.

entries.title: Nano Banana 2: Combining Pro capabilities with lightning-fast speed
entries.summary: Our latest image generation model offers advanced world knowledge, production ready specs, subject consistency and more, all at Flash speed.

entries.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro: A smarter model for your most complex tasks
entries.summary: 3.1 Pro is designed for tasks where a simple answer isn’t enough.

entries.title: A new way to express yourself: Gemini can now create music
entries.summary: The Gemini app now features our most advanced music generation model Lyria 3, empowering anyone to make 30-second tracks using text or images.

entries.title: Accelerating discovery in India through AI-powered science and education
entries.summary: Google DeepMind brings National Partnerships for AI initiative to India, scaling AI for science and education

entries.title: Gemini 3 Deep Think: Advancing science, research and engineering
entries.summary: Our most specialized reasoning mode is now updated to solve modern science, research and engineering challenges.

entries.title: Accelerating Mathematical and Scientific Discovery with Gemini Deep Think
entries.summary: Research papers point to the growing impact of Deep Think across fields

entries.title: Project Genie: Experimenting with infinite, interactive worlds
entries.summary: Google AI Ultra subscribers in the U.S. can try out Project Genie, an experimental research prototype that lets you create and explore worlds.

entries.title: D4RT: Teaching AI to see the world in four dimensions
entries.summary: D4RT: Unified, efficient 4D reconstruction and tracking up to 300x faster than prior methods.

entries.title: Veo 3.1 Ingredients to Video: More consistency, creativity and control
entries.summary: Our latest Veo update generates lively, dynamic clips that feel natural and engaging — and supports vertical video generation.
